# pangolin_idp_org (Resource)

Associates a Pangolin IDP with an organization and defines the role/org mapping policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_idp_org" "example" {
  idp_id       = pangolin_idp.example.id
  org_id       = "my-org"
  role_mapping = "'Member'"
  org_mapping  = "'my-org'"
}
```

## Import

```shell
terraform import pangolin_idp_org.example <idp_id>/<org_id>
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `idp_id` (Number, Forces Replace) The ID of the IDP.
- `org_id` (String, Forces Replace) The ID of the organization.

### Optional

- `org_mapping` (String) Expression mapping IDP claims to Pangolin org membership.
- `role_mapping` (String) Expression mapping IDP groups/claims to Pangolin roles.
